title: Manufacturing Engineer - Supreme Industries - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Supreme Industries - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Supreme Industries has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supreme Industries:
Supreme Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supreme Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
